title: Combination Sum IV
input_format: An array of distinct integers `nums` and an integer `target`.
output_format: The number of possible combinations that add up to `target`.
constraints:
- `1 <= nums.length <= 200`
- `1 <= nums[i] <= 1000`
- All elements of `nums` are unique.
- `1 <= target <= 1000`
function_signature: function combinationSum4(nums: number[], target: number): number {}
